$BDXN Airdrop Claim

Bondex's native utility token

Claim $BDXN Coin

Connect your wallet to view eligibility and claim $BDXN.

What is $BDXN?

Bondex is the largest Web3 professional and social network, providing its users with  opportunities to expand and monetize their networks as well as accelerate their careers.

FAQ: Bondex Airdrop

What’s a snapshot date?

A snapshot is when we record the wallet address connected to each user profile at a specific time to determine airdrop eligibility.

  • Season 1 Airdrop — Snapshot: June 10, 2024, 00:00 UTC
  • Bunny Blitz Campaign — Snapshot: April 21, 2024, 00:00 UTC
  • OKX Campaign — Campaign began: June 12, 2024, 16:00 UTC (snapshot details TBC)
How much will I receive?

Your reward depends on which criteria you met for each campaign.

Are there claim fees?

Yes. You’ll need to pay the gas fee to claim your $BDXN. If you don’t claim right away, your tokens stay stored and continue to accrue until you do.

What happens if I don’t claim in time?

You have three months after the vesting period to claim your tokens. For the Bondex Airdrop Season 1 and Bondex Bunny Blitz airdrop, this means up to 15 months from TGE (12-month vesting + 3-month claim window). For Bondex x OKX Cryptopedia Campaign, this means 3 months from TGE (No vesting + 3-month claim window). After that, unclaimed tokens may be reallocated to the community.

My wallet shows no claimable tokens. Why?

Check the following:

  • You’re connected with the correct wallet (the one linked to your Bondex profile at the time of the snapshot)
  • Your activity met the eligibility requirements before the snapshot
Can I use a different wallet than the one I registered with?

No. The airdrop is locked to the wallet that was connected to your Bondex account at the time of the snapshot.

Where can I get support?

Message the support team directly via the Bondex app.
